data.title: The Becker Milk Company Limited announces 2025 annual financial results in Toronto on July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Toronto, the Becker Milk Company Limited shared positive news about their financial performance for the fiscal year ending on April 30, 2025. The company, listed on the TSX as BEK.B, expressed satisfaction with the results achieved during this period.

data.title: SERMs market projected to grow 2020-2034 due to rising demand in oncology & women's health. Increase in clinical trials & regulatory approvals.
data.description: The market for Selective Estrogen Receptor Modulators (SERMs) is expected to witness significant growth in the upcoming years. This growth can be attributed to the increasing number of cancer cases, heightened awareness regarding SERMs, and a notable increase in the amount of SERMs in clinical trials or pending regulatory approval from several companies. The market is forecasted to experience a surge in demand due to these factors.

data.title: Truist will redeem $1.5 billion principal amount of senior notes due July 2026 on July 28, 2025.
data.description: Charlotte-based Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) revealed plans to redeem all $1.5 billion principal amount of its floating rate senior notes set to mature on July 28, 2026 (CUSIP 89788MAH5) on July 28, 2025.

data.title: Taco Cabana is hosting a margarita contest for National Tequila Day where guests can create a new flavor.
data.description: In celebration of National Tequila Day, the Mexican-inspired restaurant chain Taco Cabana® in San Antonio is offering special promotions for its customers. Customers can enjoy discounts and deals at the restaurant to mark this occasion.

data.title: Lundin Mining pre-announces impacts on Q2 2025 results: $6M provisional pricing adjustments, $11M unrealized gain, earnings call on Aug 7.
data.description: Lundin Mining Corporation is pre-announcing certain impacts on its earnings for the three months ending June 30, 2025. The revenue in the second quarter is expected to be negatively affected by provisional pricing adjustments of approximately $6 million on a pre-tax basis. The company is also expected to recognize an unaudited unrealized gain of approximately $11 million related to the mark-to-market valuation of its unexpired foreign exchange and commodity derivative contracts. The second quarter 2025 results will be released on August 6, 2025, with a webcast and conference call scheduled for August 7, 2025. These measures are non-GAAP, with more information available on Benzinga.com.
Aura completes U.S. IPO, raising $150M.

data.title: Nine Ethereum ETFs saw a record $726M in investments as ETH surged, hitting its highest price in months.
data.description: On Wednesday, the nine-spot Ethereum Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) attracted over $726 million in investments, coinciding with a surge in ETH's value to its peak level in several months.

data.title: Roku stock is slightly down, NFLX also down after reporting Q2 results. NFLX beat estimates but stock is sliding.
data.description: Roku, Inc. (NASDAQ: ROKU) shares experienced a slight decline in Thursday's extended trading, while Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) also saw a decrease following the release of its second-quarter results. Despite surpassing expectations in both revenue and earnings, Netflix's stock is sliding. The company has also raised its fiscal year guidance. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: IDACORP declares $0.86/share dividend (NYSE: IDA) payable Sept 2, 2025 to holders of record by Aug 5, 2025.
data.description: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) based in Boise, Idaho has announced a common stock dividend of $0.86 per share. The dividend will be payable on September 2, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 5, 2025.

data.title: SmartCentres releases 2024 ESG Report, showcasing sustainability efforts and commitments. #ESG #SRU.UN
data.description: In Toronto, SmartCentres Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: SRU.UN) unveiled its 2024 ESG Report, showcasing significant environmentally sustainable and socially conscious initiatives. The report emphasizes SmartCentres' dedication to integrating ESG principles into its operations, underlining its commitment to fostering resilient centers and driving climate action in collaboration with tenants. The company outlines its achievements and outlines future goals in the ESG domain in the released report.

data.title: Hartford HealthCare and Envision Films win 6 Emmys at the Boston/New England awards, setting a record.
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut on July 17, 2025, Hartford HealthCare collaborated with Envision Films® and achieved great success at the 47th Annual Boston/New England Emmy® Awards. The organization secured six Emmys, setting a new record and solidifying a strong acknowledgment of the dedicated teams involved.

data.title: Westwater Resources backs US DOC anti-dumping ruling on Chinese graphite. DOC targets Chinese producers.
data.description: Westwater Resources, Inc. (NYSE American: WWR), a company specializing in energy technology and battery-grade natural graphite, based in Centennial, Colorado, recently expressed its backing for the U.S. Department of Commerce's preliminary ruling in the anti-dumping investigation regarding graphite-based anode materials imported from China. This marks the second significant decision taken by the DOC against Chinese producers. WWR's support signifies a strengthening stance against unfair trade practices and aims to promote fair competition in the market.
FTC SETS ASIDE ORDERS AGAINST EXXON, CHEVRON BOARD APPOINTMENTS

data.title: Hyliion awarded $1.5M U.S. Navy contract for KARNO Power Module development.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Hyliion Holdings Corp. revealed securing a $1.5 million Phase II Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) contract from the U.S. Navy. The funding aims to enhance its KARNOTM Power Modules for shipboard and stationary military use. This follows the completion of Phase I successfully, and the company is focused on developing their scalable multi-megawatt platform for military applications.

data.title: DaVita to hold Q2 conference call on August 5, 2025, at 5pm Eastern Time to discuss results.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, DaVita Inc. (NYSE: DVA) disclosed its upcoming quarterly conference call to review second-quarter performance. Scheduled for August 5, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time, the call will follow the release of results post-market hours on the same day.
FTC reopens and sets aside Exxon-Pioneer final order

data.title: US prosecutors anticipate concluding the case against Roman Storm by July 25 after the fourth day of his trial in NY with FBI witnesses.
data.description: The criminal trial of the Tornado Cash developer entered its fourth day in New York, as the FBI brought in witnesses to testify.

data.title: Veracyte (Nasdaq: VCYT) to release Q2 2025 financial results on August 6, 2025 after the market closes. Conference call at 4:30 PM ET.
data.description: Veracyte, Inc., a prominent cancer diagnostics company based in South San Francisco, unveiled plans to disclose their financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Wednesday, August 6, 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq as VCYT, will have its management conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. During the event, they will delve into the financial results and provide a comprehensive business update. Interested parties can tune in to the live webcast of the conference call through the company's website.

data.title: Investors increase Ethereum holdings due to stablecoins approval and growing RWAs. ETH gains traction as reserve asset and store of value in DeFi.
data.description: The increasing role of Ethereum in stablecoins, RWAs, and DeFi has garnered significant institutional interest, establishing ETH as a reserve asset, store of value, and integral digital asset. This has led to a surge in demand for Ethereum, with its value and utility propelling it as a key player in the digital asset space. With the growing prominence of Ethereum in these sectors, the cryptocurrency has cemented its position as a crucial asset for investors and institutions alike, emphasizing its value and importance in the market.
Orca Energy Group Inc. reports Chief Operating Officer's exit.
